name: DORCHESTER MINERALS, L.P.
summary: Dorchester Minerals, L.P. is a publicly traded Delaware limited partnership focused on the acquisition, ownership, and administration of royalty properties and net profits interests (NPI) in oil and natural gas properties. The NPI represents a net profits overriding royalty interest, entitling the Partnership to 96.97% of net profits from Operating Partnership properties. Royalty Properties consist of mineral, royalty, overriding royalty, net profits, and leasehold interests in 594 counties and parishes across 28 states.

products.name: Royalty Properties
products.description: Producing and nonproducing mineral, royalty, overriding royalty, net profits, and leasehold interests in 594 counties and parishes across 28 states.

products.name: Net Profits Interest (NPI)
products.description: Net profits overriding royalty interest burdening properties owned by the Operating Partnership, yielding 96.97% of monthly net profits.

partnerships.description: Owns working interests underlying the NPI, provides day-to-day operational and administrative services to the Partnership.
